ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER
ORDER PROTECTIVE ORDER

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANGEL ALCARAZ' MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS SEEK DISCOVERY OF PLAINTIFF'S PRIVATE MEDICAL AND FINANCIAL INFORMATION, BUT REFUSE TO ENTER A PROTECTIVE ORDER. DEFENSE COUNSEL ARGUES THAT HIS PROMISE NOT TO MISUSE THE PRIVATE INFORMATION SUFFICES, BUT SUCH A PROMISE COULD BE MADE IN VIRTUALLY ANY CASE. ORDER AND PROTECTIVE ORDER SIGNED IN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600 =302/RU

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2018 Continued To Sep-30-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Angel Alcaraz'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Niall Vignoles of Quadra & Coll, Tel. No. 1-415-426-3502 appearing
for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Michael Shepherd of Hartsuyker, Stratman & Williams-Abrego, tel. No. 1-510-457- 3464 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANGEL ALCARAZ' Motion For Protective Order is GRANTED. Defendants seek discovery of plaintiff's private medical and financial information, but refuse to enter a protective order. Defense counsel argues that his promise not to misuse the private information suffices, but such a promise could be made in virtually any case. Order and Protective order signed in court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

Plaintiff Angel Alcaraz'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Niall Vignoles of Quadra & Coll, Telephone (415) 426-3502, appearing for Plaintiff Angel Alcarez;
Michael Shepherd of Hartsuyker, Stratman & Williams-Abrego, Telpehone (510) 457-3464, appearing for Defendants Guo Fu et al;

Defendants' counsel does not stipulate to a Judge pro tem to hear todays motion.

PLAINTIFF ANGEL ALCARAZ'S Notice Motion For Protective Order.

Continued to October 17, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. Department 302 Law and Motion. Judge Pro Tem Noah Lebowitz to prepare a Report and Recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Set For Trial On Feb-25-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
